title: banco-bank-extension
description: Provides compatibility between banco and Bank
body:
## Information

**banco-bank-extension 🏦** provides compatibility between banco and Dablakbandit's [Bank](https://github.com/AshleyThew/Bank) plugin.

### Features

* Items stored in Bank's item storage will be treated as banco items

### Dependencies

* [banco](https://modrinth.com/plugin/banco) 0.6.1+ (required)
* [Bank](https://github.com/AshleyThew/Bank) 4.8.0+ (required)
